node_5eb3dad3.title: Complaint Filed for Non-Payment

state.description: Plaintiff has filed a formal complaint in court against debtor for non-payment of the invoice despite reminder.
state.legal_issue: Formal legal action initiated due to debtor's failure to pay after reminder.

legal_references.extract: Debtor is in delay after reminder has been sent.
legal_references.summary: Establishes debtor's default after reminder for payment.

artifacts.content: Formal complaint filed by plaintiff for non-payment of invoice.

references.reference: § 276 ZPO - Frist zur Einreichung einer Klageerwiderung
references.extract: The defendant must respond to the complaint within a set period.
references.summary: Deadlines for debtor response to complaint.

deadlines.summary: Debtor must file a response to the complaint within two weeks after service.

legal_references.extract: Schuldner gerät durch Mahnung oder Fristablauf mit der Leistung in Verzug.

legal_references.extract: Kläger kann eine Klage beim Gericht einreichen, um Ansprüche geltend zu machen.
